sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ProPhase Labs Secures Funding and Completes Market Transition Following Reverse Stock Split
feed.summary: ProPhase Labs, a biotechnology and diagnostics company, has completed a series of financial and corporate actions, including securing a new equity financing facility of up to $10 million from Generating Alpha Ltd. The company also underwent a 1-for-10 reverse stock split and transitioned its trading from the Nasdaq to the OTC Pink Sheets tier following delisting. These moves, alongside the conversion of over $3.3 million in convertible debt, aim to strengthen the company's liquidity and simplify its capital structure despite continued stock volatility.

feed.title: Republic's Core Pricing Should Remain Strong as Volume Headwinds Persist; Increasing FVE to $190
feed.summary: Morningstar maintains that Republic Services (RSG) will likely see strong core pricing, despite ongoing volume headwinds in the waste management industry. The firm has increased its Fair Value Estimate (FVE) for Republic Services to $190, recognizing its strong market position and extensive network of collection routes and landfill assets. Republic Services, as a fully integrated waste hauler, leverages its infrastructure for high internalization rates, directing waste from various sectors into its valuable landfill assets.

feed.title: Raymond James Brings In $175 Million Advisor Janet Bone
feed.summary: Raymond James & Associates has recruited financial advisor Janet Bone, CFP, who previously managed $175 million in client assets at Benjamin F. Edwards & Company. Bone, joined by client service associate Peggy Rakers, will serve families and individuals in St. Louis. Her decision was driven by Raymond James' succession planning options and technology enhancements, aiming to provide continuity for clients and improve day-to-day operations.

feed.title: A flood of new LNG projects could reshape gas markets in 2026
feed.summary: Global liquefied natural gas (LNG) supply is projected to significantly increase in 2026 due to new projects in various regions, potentially easing market tightness and lowering prices. This surge in supply is expected to stimulate demand, particularly in Asian markets like China and India, and help Europe replenish gas storage while reducing reliance on Russian pipeline gas. The shift signals a more competitive and lower-priced global gas market, impacting investment decisions and trade flows.

feed.title: My 5 Favorite Stocks to Buy Right Now
feed.summary: Geoffrey Seiler identifies five attractive stocks in the consumer sector: Amazon, Chewy, Philip Morris International, Dutch Bros, and JAKKS Pacific. He highlights Amazon and Chewy for their e-commerce growth and valuation, Philip Morris International for its defensive growth, Dutch Bros as a pure growth play, and JAKKS Pacific as a cheap turnaround opportunity with upcoming movie catalysts. The article provides a brief analysis of each company's financial performance, market position, and growth prospects.

feed.title: NYS PSC Approves Con Ed Rate Increase of 3.5% this year, 3.2% in ’27, and 3.1% in ’28
feed.summary: The New York State Public Service Commission (PSC) approved a three-year electric and gas rate plan for Consolidated Edison (Con Edison), significantly reducing the company's initial rate increase request. The approved plan includes increases of 3.5% in 2026, 3.2% in 2027, and 3.1% in 2028, balancing affordability for customers with the need to ensure system reliability and meet state objectives. This joint proposal, supported by numerous parties including consumer advocates and environmental groups, aims for efficiency savings and defers non-essential capital projects.

feed.title: Evaluating Silicon Labs (SLAB) Valuation After New Analyst Coverage And Bluetooth Partnership
feed.summary: Silicon Laboratories (SLAB) is gaining attention due to new analyst coverage and a Bluetooth beacon partnership, highlighting its wireless and IoT focus. Despite mixed past returns, the stock is currently trading around US$145, considered moderately undervalued with a narrative fair value near $150 based on growth and margin improvements from new wireless platforms. However, its P/S ratio is slightly above industry averages, suggesting potential risk if growth falters.

feed.title: The Bull Case For High Tide (TSXV:HITI) Could Change Following New Voting Agreements Learn Why
feed.summary: High Tide Inc. recently filed agreements outlining how certain stakeholders will vote and interact with the company, formalizing governance around its cannabis retail and e-commerce expansion. While not a major financial event, these "Voting Support and Standstill Agreements" aim to reduce boardroom disruption and provide clarity on control, which could be helpful given recent share price weakness. However, the core risks around profitability and regulation for High Tide remain, despite the governance clean-up.

feed.title: Is Coherent’s New Diamond Cooling And Quantum Security Push Altering The Investment Case For COHR?
feed.summary: Coherent Corp. launched new Bondable Diamond thermal-management solutions and collaborated with Quside on a quantum entropy source, aiming to strengthen its position in AI data centers and high-performance semiconductors. While these advances enhance Coherent’s long-term product roadmap and investment narrative, analysts suggest they are unlikely to impact short-term earnings significantly, given the stock's current valuation and recent performance. Investors are advised to consider various perspectives and existing risks, as the stock may already be overextended.

feed.title: $IONQ stock fell 7% this week. Here's what we see in our data.
feed.summary: IONQ stock declined 7% this week, making it the 26th most-searched ticker on Quiver Quantitative. Insider trading data shows 11 sales against 1 purchase in the last six months, totaling significant selling by officers. Despite this, institutional investors like Morgan Stanley, Vanguard Group, and BlackRock have substantially increased their holdings, and Wall Street analysts maintain "Buy" or "Outperform" ratings with a median price target of $72.5.

feed.title: Freeport Q4 Beat Highlights Grasberg Recovery And Long Term Copper Upside
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE:FCX) reported strong Q4 and full-year results, with operations at its Grasberg mine progressing towards a Q2 2026 restart after a mudflow incident. The company is advancing key growth projects in the Americas and Indonesia, aiming to increase copper volumes and improve unit costs. Investors will be watching the Grasberg recovery and the ramp-up of these growth projects as drivers for long-term value.

feed.title: Is Prologis (PLD) Pricing Looked At Differently After Recent Share Price Pullback?
feed.summary: Prologis (PLD) stock has experienced a recent pullback, dropping 4.5% in the last week and 1.5% in the past month, though it remains up 10.7% over the year and 41.7% over five years. Despite its strong market position in industrial real estate, Simply Wall St's valuation analysis suggests it is overvalued, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model indicating it's 23.0% above its intrinsic value and its P/E ratio exceeding both industry averages and its proprietary "Fair Ratio." The article encourages investors to explore "Narratives" on its community page for a more personalized valuation approach.

feed.title: VICI Properties Announces 2025 Tax Treatment For Distributions
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. has announced the tax treatment for its 2025 distributions, specifying categories such as ordinary dividends, return of capital, and Section 199A dividends. The total distribution per share for 2025 will be $2.1975, with $1.7475 reportable in the 2025 tax year. This information is crucial for investors in the REIT, which owns significant hospitality and entertainment assets like Caesars Palace and MGM Grand.

feed.title: FFIV INVESTOR ALERT: F5, Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit, Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP Announces
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) for alleged violations of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934. The lawsuit, captioned Smith v. F5, Inc., claims that F5 misled investors about its revenue outlook and growth, downplaying risks while facing a significant security incident that impacted its BIG-IP product development environment. Investors who suffered substantial losses are encouraged to seek lead plaintiff status by February 17, 2026.

feed.title: CVS Health Corp.: How a Pharmacy Giant Is Turning Itself Into a Full-Stack Health Platform
feed.summary: CVS Health Corp. is transforming from a traditional pharmacy chain into a comprehensive, data-driven health platform. The company is integrating retail pharmacies, health services, insurance, and digital tools to create a cohesive health ecosystem. This strategy aims to improve patient outcomes, enhance customer loyalty, and position CVS as a leading vertically integrated health product rather than just a drug store.

feed.title: How Jabil’s RF Power Push with EHT Semi Could Reshape the JBL Semiconductor Narrative
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. announced a minority investment and manufacturing collaboration with Eagle Harbor Technologies (EHT Semi) to enhance its capabilities in advanced RF and pulsed-power systems for semiconductor fabrication. This move aligns Jabil more closely with the semiconductor industry's evolving needs, especially in critical chipmaking technologies. While the collaboration is unlikely to have an immediate impact, it accentuates Jabil's focus on complex electronics and advanced semiconductor systems, potentially shifting its investment narrative towards technology execution and capital intensity.

feed.title: Driven Brands’ chief legal officer O’Melia sells $750k in stock
feed.summary: Driven Brands Holdings Inc.'s Chief Legal Officer, Scott L. O’Melia, sold 46,875 shares of company stock for $750,000 on January 21, 2026. Despite the auto services company being unprofitable in the last year, analysts predict profitability this year, with earnings due on February 19, and the stock showing 9.18% year-to-date growth. InvestingPro suggests the stock is undervalued, with analyst price targets indicating potential upside.

feed.title: CRWV Investors Have Opportunity to Lead CoreWeave, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV) for alleged securities fraud, encouraging investors who purchased securities between March 28, 2025, and December 15, 2025, to contact the firm. The lawsuit claims CoreWeave made false and misleading statements regarding its ability to meet customer demand and its reliance on a single third-party vendor for data centers, which was revealed through a failed acquisition and delayed data center operations. Investors are invited to join the case before March 13, 2026, to recover damages.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy's 3,300-person expanded electric workforce pre-positioned at area staging sites and ready to mobilize ahead of late-night winter weather
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy has pre-positioned its 3,300-person expanded electric workforce and 700 natural gas workers to respond to severe winter weather expected in Southeast Texas. The company has activated its Emergency Operations Center, strategically placed staging sites in the Greater Houston area, and taken extensive safety and preparation measures for potential ice accumulation, strong winds, and freezing temperatures. Customers are urged to prepare, enroll in outage alerts, and follow safety guidelines, especially regarding downed power lines.

feed.title: Boston Properties Inc Is Quietly Eating Your City Alive – But Is BXP Stock Still Worth the Hype?
feed.summary: This article examines Boston Properties Inc (BXP), a major real estate investment trust (REIT) focusing on high-end office and mixed-use properties in major US cities. It discusses whether BXP stock is a worthwhile investment, especially in the context of ongoing debates about the future of office work and urban recovery. The piece concludes that BXP is a serious contender for investors who believe in the long-term viability of city-core real estate, contrasting it with competitors like Alexandria Real Estate Equities.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy's 3,300-person expanded electric workforce pre-positioned at area staging sites and ready to mobilize ahead of late-night winter weather
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy has mobilized an expanded 3,300-person electric workforce and over 700 natural gas workers in anticipation of a major winter storm affecting Southeast Texas. The company has pre-positioned resources, activated its Emergency Operations Center, and implemented cold weather action plans to ensure a swift response to potential outages and service interruptions. Customers are urged to prepare for freezing temperatures, strong winds, and ice accumulation, and to enroll in Power Alert Service for updates.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy's 3,300-person expanded electric workforce pre-positioned at area staging sites and ready to mobilize ahead of late-night winter weather
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy has pre-positioned an expanded workforce of 3,300 electric and over 700 natural gas workers, along with equipment, ahead of a major winter weather system expected to bring freezing temperatures, strong winds, and potential ice accumulation to Southeast Texas. The company has activated its Emergency Operations Center and encourages customers to enroll in Power Alert Service and prepare for the severe weather, emphasizing safety around downed power lines. These preparations are part of CenterPoint's extensive cold weather action plans, including equipment inspections, training, and coordination with state energy entities.

feed.title: As Texas braces for ice, 3,300 workers stand by to keep Houston powered
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy has mobilized a 3,300-person electric workforce and 700 natural gas workers in preparation for an approaching winter storm in Southeast Texas. The company has pre-positioned equipment and staff at staging sites, particularly in the northeastern Greater Houston area, which is expected to be most impacted by ice. CenterPoint is also coordinating with state regulatory bodies and urging customers to prepare for freezing temperatures and potential outages.

feed.title: TJX Companies Stock: Quiet Retail Giant, Loud Market Returns
feed.summary: TJX Companies Inc. (TJX) has quietly outperformed the retail sector, leveraging its off-price model, global sourcing, and disciplined inventory management to deliver consistent market-beating returns. The company has shown robust performance over the past year, with its stock outpacing traditional department stores and broader market indices due to strong traffic, expanding margins, and strategic buying opportunities. Wall Street analysts are largely bullish on TJX, citing its defensive profile and unique ability to thrive in various economic conditions, with future growth expected from scale, international expansion, and careful digital integration.

feed.title: Cold Weather Prompts Xcel Energy To Suggest Smart Energy-saving Tips This Weekend
feed.summary: Xcel Energy is urging its customers in the Upper Midwest to conserve energy this weekend due to anticipated widespread cold temperatures and high energy demand. While Xcel has sufficient generation capacity, the Midcontinent Independent System Operator (MISO) forecasts strain on the larger regional grid. Customers are advised to take simple steps like adjusting thermostats, using natural light, and scheduling energy-intensive appliance use for off-peak hours to help reduce demand.

feed.title: Libya inks $20 bn energy deal with TotalEnergies, ConocoPhillips
feed.summary: Libya has signed a $20 billion energy deal with TotalEnergies and ConocoPhillips, aiming to boost its oil production by 850,000 barrels per day over the next 25 years. This agreement is projected to generate over $370 billion in revenues and was announced at the Libya Energy and Economic Summit in Tripoli. The country, which holds Africa's largest oil reserves, seeks to attract major global energy companies despite ongoing political instability.

feed.title: PSCT ETF Jumped 23% Just by Holding Unknown, Small Cap Tech Stocks
feed.summary: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Information Technology ETF (PSCT) returned 23% over the past year by focusing on 75 small-cap tech companies. The fund's performance is attributed to the repricing of small-cap technology stocks as interest rates stabilize, benefiting companies in capital-intensive segments. However, its concentration in cyclical tech subsectors like crypto mining, exemplified by Marathon Digital, introduces volatility, necessitating careful monitoring of interest rate directions and portfolio rebalancing.

feed.title: New Era Energy & Digital inks key data center deal – ICYMI
feed.summary: New Era Energy & Digital (NASDAQ:NUAI) has announced a strategic partnership with Primary Digital Infrastructure to power next-generation data centers, aiming for up to one gigawatt of data center capacity. This collaboration leverages Primary Digital's experience in constructing large-scale data centers while New Era focuses on behind-the-meter power generation using natural gas. The company plans to deliver this capacity in phases, targeting hyperscale customers, with an estimated investment of $10 to $14 million per megawatt.

feed.title: Assessing Roper Technologies (ROP) Valuation After IntelliTrans DAT Freight Partnership And Earnings Growth Hopes
feed.summary: Roper Technologies (ROP) is under valuation scrutiny following its IntelliTrans unit's partnership with DAT Freight & Analytics and ahead of upcoming earnings, with the stock currently trading at a reported 37% intrinsic discount. Despite a 22.78% decline over the past year, its software-driven, recurring cash flow model, enhanced by AI and cloud solutions, suggests a fair value of $548.13 per share against its current $407.61. The company's recent strategic moves and expected earnings growth are seen as potential catalysts for its stock.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Mettler-Toledo International (MTD) Adding Ex-STERIS CFO To Its Board
feed.summary: Mettler-Toledo International (MTD) has appointed Michael J. Tokich, former CFO of STERIS plc, to its Board of Directors, a move aimed at enhancing financial leadership and capital allocation oversight. While Tokich's appointment adds valuable sector-specific financial expertise, the article suggests it's unlikely to significantly alter the company's core short-term earnings or demand catalysts. Investors are advised to consider the company's high debt load and valuation, alongside the diverse fair value estimates from private investors, before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Halliburton Eyes Venezuela Return As Undervalued Stock Faces New Growth Test
feed.summary: Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) is preparing for a potential return to Venezuela by soliciting resumes for technical and engineering roles, following U.S. government encouragement for American oil companies to invest there. This move could reconnect Halliburton with a major oil-producing country and impact its revenue and global footprint. While Simply Wall St flags the stock as undervalued, investors should consider execution risks, political stability, and how new contracts will affect financial metrics like debt and margins.

feed.title: Assessing Biogen (BIIB) Valuation After New EU Approval For High Dose Spinraza
feed.summary: The European Commission has approved a high-dose regimen of SPINRAZA for 5q spinal muscular atrophy, prompting a re-evaluation of Biogen's stock. Despite recent volatility, with a 14.48% return over 90 days but a 3.50% year-to-date decline, Biogen is currently trading at US$171.59 and is estimated to be 9.5% undervalued with a fair value of $189.66. The valuation is supported by a robust late-stage pipeline, though risks include underperformance of key launches and pricing pressures.

feed.title: Astec Industries Inc (ASTE) Stock Price Down 2.79% on Jan 23
feed.summary: Astec Industries Inc (ASTE) saw its stock price drop 2.79% on January 23, closing at $48.36, which is 5.03% below its 52-week high. Analysts have an average target price of $56.50, suggesting a 16.83% upside, with a "Buy" recommendation. However, GuruFocus's GF Value estimates a fair value of $44.19, indicating a potential downside of 8.62%.

feed.title: The Truth About TimkenSteel Corp (TMST): Quiet Stock, Loud Moves – Are You Sleeping on This Play?
feed.summary: TimkenSteel Corp (TMST) is presented as a quiet, old-school steel player that might be an overlooked opportunity for value investors. The article explores TMST's stock performance, business model, and risk factors, comparing it to larger competitors and concluding it could be a high-risk/high-reward play for investors comfortable with industrial cycles and small-cap volatility. It emphasizes that TMST is not a meme stock but a fundamentals-driven investment.

feed.title: Sun Pharma Bid Puts Organon Valuation And Growth Prospects In Focus
feed.summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries has made a non-binding offer to acquire Organon (NYSE: OGN), potentially marking the largest cross-border acquisition by an Indian pharmaceutical company. This proposed deal, which would expand Sun Pharma's presence in women's health and biosimilars, has brought Organon's valuation and growth prospects into sharp focus. Organon's stock has seen significant recent gains following the news, despite prior declines, and is currently trading just above analyst targets but is flagged as undervalued by Simply Wall St.

feed.title: Assessing Public Storage (PSA) Valuation As Q4 Earnings Approach And Industry Conditions Remain Soft
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) is heading into its Q4 2025 earnings with expectations of modest FFO growth despite soft industry conditions. The stock is currently trading at an 8.65% discount to the average analyst target and an estimated 36.61% intrinsic discount, suggesting it is undervalued. Strategic portfolio expansion, including recent acquisitions and successful lease-ups, is expected to drive future revenue and NOI growth.

feed.title: The Truth About Yext Inc: Is This ‘AI Search’ Stock a Hidden Gem or Dead App Walking?
feed.summary: This article examines Yext Inc (YEXT), an AI search platform for businesses, and questions whether it's a valuable investment or a struggling tech company. It discusses Yext's core offering of AI-powered search for brands, its position in the competitive AI landscape against larger tech giants, and its volatile stock performance. The article concludes that Yext is a speculative bet for those interested in AI infrastructure and B2B SaaS turnaround stories, rather than a mainstream "must-have."

feed.title: The Truth About Delta Air Lines Inc.: Is This Airline Stock Secretly a Power Move?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Delta Air Lines Inc. (NYSE: DAL) stock, questioning if it's a solid investment despite its strong brand and social media presence. It highlights Delta's premium strategy, post-pandemic travel recovery, and robust financials, but also acknowledges industry risks like fuel prices and labor costs. The piece concludes that Delta is a strong long-term play for investors who can handle market volatility, positioning it as a balanced choice compared to its competitors.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Likely to Announce Stock Split, Market Cap at $164 Billion
feed.summary: Booking Holdings, with a market capitalization of $164 billion and a share price of over $5,000, is considered the most probable candidate for a stock split, which could attract more retail investors. While NVR and Seaboard are also high-priced stocks, NVR has historically avoided splits, and Seaboard's volatility makes a split risky during economic downturns. Analysts have a positive outlook for Booking Holdings, with an average 1-year price target of $6,153, indicating potential for stock price appreciation.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Fermi Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit, Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP Announces
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Fermi Inc. (NASDAQ: FRMI) for investors who suffered substantial losses. The lawsuit alleges that Fermi made false or misleading statements in its IPO documents concerning tenant demand for its Project Matador campus and the reliance on a single tenant's funding, which was later terminated. Investors who purchased Fermi stock during the Class Period (October 1, 2025 – December 11, 2025) have until March 6, 2026, to seek appointment as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Southern Copper Price Target Raised Amid Strong Copper Demand Projections
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has significantly raised its price target for Southern Copper (SCCO) from $144 to $182, citing strong anticipated demand for copper and aluminum, coupled with limited new supply and high U.S. prices. While other firms like Citi and Goldman Sachs maintain more cautious stances with Sell ratings, they have also increased their price targets. Southern Copper demonstrates robust financial health with strong margins and revenue growth, positioning it well to capitalize on favorable market conditions and potential tariff adjustments.

feed.title: Kaplan Fox Reminds Investors of Jefferies Financial Group Inc. (JEF) to an Investigation of Potential Securities Law Violations
feed.summary: Kaplan Fox & Kilsheimer LLP is investigating potential securities violations against Jefferies Financial Group Inc. (JEF) following reports of the firm's relationship with collapsed car parts company First Brands Group. News articles from The Financial Times detailed Jefferies' exposure to First Brands' invoices, its opaque financing, and a subsequent $30 million loss, leading to significant drops in Jefferies' stock price. The SEC is also reportedly investigating whether Jefferies adequately informed investors about their exposure to First Brands.

feed.title: Fortinet Stock Surges as TD Cowen Sets $100 Buy Target
feed.summary: Fortinet (FTNT) stock surged over 5% after TD Cowen upgraded its rating from Hold to Buy, setting a $100 price target. This positive analyst sentiment, coupled with robust financial fundamentals like an 80.9% gross margin and strong revenue growth, indicates investor confidence in the cybersecurity firm. Despite broader industry challenges and some varied analyst targets, Fortinet's strategic expansions, AI initiatives, and participation in the World Economic Forum position it for continued upward momentum.

feed.title: The Bull Case For FactSet Research Systems (FDS) Could Change Following Barclays Multiyear Platform Win Learn Why
feed.summary: Barclays has entered into a multiyear agreement with FactSet Research Systems to utilize its data, analytics, and technology solutions. This deal reinforces FactSet's position as a key provider to major financial institutions, strengthening its investment narrative despite moderate growth forecasts and existing debt concerns. While the partnership is a positive development, FactSet's long-term performance will still heavily depend on product integration, debt management, and client retention amidst intense market competition.

feed.title: Granite Point Mortgage: I'm Adding To My High-Yield Preferred Stock Position
feed.summary: Granite Point Mortgage Trust is showing signs of operational recovery, with improved net interest income and a de-risked balance sheet. The author recommends the Series A preferred shares (GPMT.PR.A) due to their attractive yield and potential reset to 11.6% if SOFR remains high, while rating the common shares as a speculative buy. The company specializes in originating and investing in floating-rate commercial mortgage loans.

feed.title: A Look At AvalonBay Communities (AVB) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities (AVB) has experienced recent share price weakness, with a 13.75% decline over the past year, prompting investors to re-evaluate its valuation. Despite this, the stock shows stronger long-term returns and is considered undervalued by analysts, with a fair value of $203.40 against its current price of $178.77. This valuation is supported by expectations of alleviated competitive pressures and higher margins in its core markets due to low new multifamily supply.

feed.title: GoldMining Inc. Shares Surge as Roth Capital Raises Price Target
feed.summary: GoldMining Inc. (GLDG) shares have surged by 10.53% after Roth Capital raised its price target from $2.60 to $2.80, maintaining a Buy rating. This positive sentiment is further fueled by promising new assay results from the São Jorge Project, indicating significant upside potential for the company. Despite operational challenges reflected in negative profitability margins, GLDG maintains a strong balance sheet and robust liquidity, positioning it for a positive trajectory in the materials and mining sector.

feed.title: Hotel101 Global eyeing $300 million from US share sale
feed.summary: Hotel101 Global Holdings Corp., a Nasdaq-listed subsidiary of DoubleDragon Corp., plans to raise up to $300 million through the issuance of perpetual convertible preferred shares in the United States. This capital-raising effort aims to fund the company's global expansion of Hotel101 projects, advancing its asset-light, technology-enabled hospitality platform. The initiative follows Hotel101 Global's historic US Nasdaq listing last year and seeks to secure commitments for a substantial portfolio of rooms worldwide through joint ventures and licensing agreements.

feed.title: Edgewise Therapeutics(EWTX.US) Director Sells US$3.4 Million in Common Stock
feed.summary: Edris Badreddin, a director at Edgewise Therapeutics (EWTX.US), sold 115,470 shares of common stock on January 21, 2026. The transaction was valued at approximately $3.4 million, with shares sold at an average price of $29.44. This sale is a required disclosure under federal securities laws for company insiders.

feed.title: Meta 'Peak Pressure' Priced In As Valuation Gap With Alphabet Narrows, Analyst Sees Nearly 40% Upside
feed.summary: An analyst identifies Meta Platforms Inc. as a potential buying opportunity, citing its current discount compared to Alphabet Inc. and the anticipated impact of Meta's new AI model in narrowing the valuation gap. Despite recent stock drops due to AI infrastructure spending concerns, the analyst believes "peak pressure" is priced in and sees nearly 40% upside, supported by Meta's cost controls, ad optimization, and WhatsApp's growth potential. Additionally, Meta's Threads app shows strong user growth, suggesting positive future performance.
